item.title: Notiqflow 0.3.1
item.description:
Notiqflow 0.3.1

  • More reliable correction learning. Corrections that change one or more words—such as “Notique Flow” to “Notiqflow”—now trigger a clear confirmation and can be applied to your very next dictation.
  • Better dictionary control. Review, edit, star, import, or remove saved vocabulary and replacement rules directly in Notiqflow settings.
  • A compact Flow Bar that stays where you put it. Drag the smaller Flow Bar to your preferred position; it now uses the waveform animation while processing instead of extra status text.
  • Transparent, privacy-safe reliability metrics. Notiqflow can share anonymous feature usage, timings, and success or failure categories to help improve the app. It never sends audio, dictated text, correction words, dictionary contents, destination app names, or field contents, and can be disabled under Settings > Privacy.
